subcodes.first_line: O Herald! The Wronged One giveth thee glad tidings of God's loving-kindness and grace, and maketh mention of that whereby thy name and thy remembrance shall endure [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا بشیر یبشرک المظلوم بعنایه الله و فضله و یذکرک بما یبقی به اسمک و ذکرک فی
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @exhortations and counsels, @consolation and comfort
